evidence.description: Hosseini faced impeachment proceedings in parliament over lax banking supervision related to the $2.6 billion embezzlement scandal; he survived the vote after parliamentary speaker Ali Larijani intervened.
Finance Minister Hosseini was implicated by parliament for failure of banking supervision that allowed the fraud to occur.

editorial_notes: Hosseini survived impeachment vote after Larijani's intervention. The scandal occurred during his tenure as Finance Minister.
